info.english_meaning: to call to invite to hear
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: adantaH  ' kUwa ' ityasya pAWAntaramidam  SrAvaRam samayodGozaRam  nimantraRam AjYA
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAm pfTag rUpeRa nEva pAWyate  parantu tatra 10.436 guRa ityatra 'pAWAntaram - keta SrAvaRe nimantraRe ca' iti nirdeSena ayaM pAWaBedaH jYApitaH asti  DAturUpanandinyAm bfhadDAtukusumAkare tu ayaM DAtuH pfTag rUpeREva pAWyate
